qwen3_tts.title: Qwen3 TTS
qwen3_tts.hero_title: Natural speech and voice clone in one tool
qwen3_tts.hero_body: Write a line, pick a voice, or drop in a reference clip. The app keeps the workflow simple: compose, configure, save, generate.
qwen3_tts.step_script: 2. Write what the voice should say
qwen3_tts.sample_ad_text: Introducing ContextHub Audio Tools. Generate clean speech, refine your voice workflow, and deliver polished audio in minutes.
qwen3_tts.sample_narration_text: The corridor was quiet, but the city outside still hummed with distant energy as the lights flickered on one by one.
qwen3_tts.sample_short_text: Hello from ContextHub. This is a quick voice test.
qwen3_tts.speaker: Speaker
qwen3_tts.mode_hint_custom: Fastest path. Pick a built-in speaker and shape the delivery with instruction.
qwen3_tts.mode_hint_clone: Best for matching a real voice. Add a clean reference clip and matching transcript.
qwen3_tts.mode_hint_design: Describe a new voice character in natural language and let Qwen design it.
qwen3_tts.profile_delete_guard: At least one voice profile is required.
qwen3_tts.voice_design_default: A clear, modern Korean female voice in her late twenties with soft warmth, clean diction, and steady confidence.
qwen3_tts.style_precise_text: Use precise diction, short pauses, and a clean professional delivery.
qwen3_tts.style_natural_text: Speak naturally with clear pacing and a calm, confident tone.
qwen3_tts.style_warm_text: Use a warm, friendly tone with gentle emphasis and smooth phrasing.
qwen3_tts.style_energetic_text: Deliver the line with bright energy, crisp emphasis, and upbeat pacing.
qwen3_tts.ref_audio_hint: Use a clean speech sample for the most stable clone result.
qwen3_tts.output_hint: A WAV file will be created in the selected folder.
qwen3_tts.selection_none: No bubble selected. New text will be added at the bottom.
qwen3_tts.selection_active: Selected bubble: click Add Bubble to update it.
qwen3_tts.status_hint: Click a bubble to edit, regenerate, delete, or swap voice profile.
qwen3_tts.dialogue_sample_reply: This second line shows how another profile can answer in the same batch.
qwen3_tts.dialogue_empty: Add at least one dialogue line.
qwen3_tts.clone_profile_missing_audio: Voice Clone profiles need a reference audio file.
qwen3_tts.design_profile_missing_prompt: Voice Design profiles need a voice description.
qwen3_tts.no_last_output: No generated output is available yet.
qwen3_tts.context_idle: Start with text, then choose a voice.
qwen3_tts.context_custom: Preset Voice is best when you want fast, clean speech from built-in speakers.
qwen3_tts.context_clone: Clone from Audio uses a reference clip. Add a matching transcript for the most stable result.
qwen3_tts.context_text_loaded: Text file detected. Script and output folder were prefilled from the selected file.
qwen3_tts.context_audio_loaded: Reference audio detected. Voice Clone mode was selected automatically.
qwen3_tts.ref_audio_required: Reference audio is required in voice clone mode.
